title: Where can I read Evangelion Anima
display_title: Where can I read Evangelion Anima
wikitext:
[]: Where can I read Evangelion Anima Post by illustriusCheese » Fri Jan 06, 2012 11:23 pm Google hasn't helped much so I'm hoping you guys could help.

[]: Post by symbv » Fri Jan 06, 2012 11:29 pm Do you know there is a thread for Anima in this forum? http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7424/Evangelion-ANIMA/ I did some translation of the synopsis of the more recent episodes, but as far as I know there is no full translation of the fiction.

[]: Post by illustriusCheese » Fri Jan 06, 2012 11:36 pm Thanks! And sorry, I did'nt know.
